title: chrysocoma hantamensis
intro: Chrysocoma hantamensis, also known as Hantam's root or Hantam's tea, is a plant species native to the fynbos region of South Africa. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Chrysocoma hantamensis include relief from arthritis, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Chrysocoma hantamensis is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in capsule or tincture form.
